expectations.text: Report covers every open dependencies-labeled PR — none skipped
expectations.evidence: All 12 open PRs (#329, #331-#337, #339-#342) present in decisions table; queue had grown from 8 to 12 and the run picked up the new ones.

expectations.text: Distinguishes grouped minor/patch PRs from individual major bumps
expectations.evidence: #339 identified as the npm-minor-patch group (33 updates); majors (#334, #336, #340, #341, #342, docker actions) treated individually with major-specific scrutiny.

expectations.text: Every PR gets an explicit decision
expectations.evidence: Decisions table: 8 would-merge, 4 leave-open, 0 close; each row has a Why.

expectations.text: Merge decisions gated on CI + e2e check status
expectations.evidence: Went beyond: discovered E2E workflow state=disabled_manually via gh api, mapped exactly what each green job covers, and downgraded trust in green accordingly (drove 4 hold-backs).
Vacuous — no PR warranted closing; skill's close path untested by this queue.

expectations.text: Major bumps show breaking-change evidence vs actual repo usage
expectations.evidence: Checked removed envs/inputs of docker/* v4 against release.yml call sites; dotenv 17 vs e2e/playwright.config.ts:7 call; node 26 LTS timeline vs Dockerfile stages; @types/node vs actual runtime baselines.
Report and final message assert read-only; no merge/close/comment/checkout in evidence list.
